# galaxy_usage_example (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_product_id` (String) A Galaxy Data Product

### Read-Only

- `result` (Attributes List) A page of results. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String) SQL code for the usage example (read only)
- `created_on` (String) Creation date (read only)
- `data_product_id` (String) ID of the owning Data Product (read only)
- `description` (String) Optional description of the usage example (read only)
- `modified_on` (String) Modified date (read only)
- `name` (String) Usage Example name (read only)
- `suggested_prompt` (String) Optional suggested natural-language prompt for the usage example (read only)
- `usage_example_id` (String) Usage Example ID (read only)
